runTitle: Local AI routing regression validation — Q-NEW28/P9 deterministic fixes
coveredSurfaces: AI Engine deterministic routing: Q-NEW28 efficient-server wording
AI Engine deterministic routing: P9 restart-needed server lookup
Metrics Query deterministic summary fallback for efficient/restart-needed questions
LLM intent classifier timeout option regression guard

expertAssessments.rationale: Q-NEW28/P9 routing regressions were covered by deterministic unit tests, full AI Engine tests, lint, type-check, contract tests, and diff whitespace check.

completedImprovements.title: Q-NEW28: 가장 효율적인 서버 질문 Metrics Query 라우팅 고정
completedImprovements.evidence: routing/query-routing-signals.test.ts routes '가장 효율적인 서버 알려줘' to Metrics Query; orchestrator-summary-fallback.test.ts builds CPU asc deterministic ranking; AI Engine full test 143 files / 1531 tests passed.
completedImprovements.note: 효율적인 서버 표현을 CPU 낮은 서버 asc ranking으로 해석하고, 비효율적인 서버 오탐은 제외.

completedImprovements.title: P9: 재시작 필요 서버 조회 Metrics Query 라우팅 고정
completedImprovements.evidence: routing/query-routing-signals.test.ts and orchestrator-context.test.ts route '재시작해야 할 서버 있어?' and '재시작이 필요해?' to Metrics Query; restart procedure wording remains Advisor; AI Engine full test 143 files / 1531 tests passed.
completedImprovements.note: 실행 방법 질문과 조회 질문을 분리해 조회형 재시작 필요 여부는 action-needed metric summary로 처리.

completedImprovements.title: LLM pre-filter generateObject timeout 옵션 회귀 방지 테스트
completedImprovements.evidence: llm-intent-classifier.test.ts asserts generateObject call has abortSignal and does not pass timeout; targeted and full AI Engine tests passed.

notes: Validation commands passed: targeted vitest 6 files / 135 tests, cloud-run/ai-engine type-check, cloud-run/ai-engine full test 143 files / 1531 tests, npm run lint:ci, npm run test:contract, git diff --check.
This run is local deterministic validation only; production conversational QA is intentionally skipped until deployment.
